\centry{Ohio State University Alumni Association}{Career Mentor -- Volunteer}{Remote}{August 2021 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Provide one-on-one career coaching to three to five current OSU students and recent graduates each semester, advising on resume strategy, networking, and offer negotiation
  \item Facilitated two virtual panels on breaking into finance and tech for a combined audience of 200 students through the College of Arts and Sciences career series
  \item Reviewed and gave structured written feedback on 30+ student resumes and cover letters submitted through the alumni mentoring portal
  \item Recognized as a top-rated mentor in the 2023 program cohort based on participant satisfaction surveys
\end{itemize}
